ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock market data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the stock */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "shares_traded" INTEGER /* Number of shares traded during the day */,
  "turnover" REAL /* Total turnover in rupees crore */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume weighted average price of the stock */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Price of the stock before the market opens */,
  "after_market_price" REAL /* Price of the stock after the market closes */,
  "volume_change" INTEGER /* Change in volume compared to the previous day */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Change in price compared to the previous day */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., API, manual entry) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "sector" INTEGER /* Sector to which the stock belongs */,
  "market_capitalization" TEXT /* Total market value of the company */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Annual dividend yield */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the stock details were updated */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_sector FOREIGN KEY ("sector") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  "trading_hours_start" TEXT /* Start time of trading hours */,
  "trading_hours_end" TEXT /* End time of trading hours */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "average_pe_ratio" REAL /* Average P/E ratio of stocks in the sector */,
  "average_dividend_yield" REAL /* Average dividend yield of stocks in the sector */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the sector details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst) */,
  "subscription_level" TEXT /* Subscription level of the user (e.g., basic, premium) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_registered" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the stock data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the news is related to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the news article was published */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the news article */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Score indicating the sentiment of the news article (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst report */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the report is related to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the report was published */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial analyst */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the analyst */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation given by the analyst */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the analyst report */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company name of the analyst */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., earnings, outlook) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the report */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Score indicating the sentiment of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_reports_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the investment portfolio */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the portfolio was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the portfolio was last updated */,
  "initial_investment" REAL /* Initial amount invested in the portfolio */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the portfolio */,
  "return_percentage" REAL /* Percentage return on the portfolio */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the portfolio (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was purchased */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the stock was purchased */,
  "current_price" REAL /* Current price of the stock */,
  "shares_owned" INTEGER /* Number of shares owned */,
  "investment_value" REAL /* Total value of the investment in the stock */,
  "profit_loss" REAL /* Profit or loss on the investment */,
  "percentage_change" REAL /* Percentage change in the stock value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id", "stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock for which the alert is set */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the alert was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, dismissed) */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Last time the alert was triggered */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
